summary: Impressive second set praised while recording details are unknown
review: The single review spotlights a powerhouse second set, calling it "heckuva" and awarding the show four stars. No information is given about the source or fidelity of the audio, so listeners should assume an average‑quality recording until more data appear.

ai_rating.rationale: Review is enthusiastic about the second set (show quality high) but provides no insight into recording quality; with only one brief review, confidence in rating is limited.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound clarity, mix or source type were provided.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set described as "fire"; overall pacing and energy of the latter half of the concert are highlighted positively.
